name: Exposed Cloud Resource Response
description: Responds to publicly exposed cloud resources such as S3 buckets, databases, or security groups with overly permissive rules. Riggs AI assesses the risk of the exposed resource including data sensitivity, access patterns, and blast radius. Public exposures require team lead approval before automated remediation restricts access, scans for data exposure indicators, creates a compliance incident ticket, and notifies both compliance and security teams. Resources with restricted access are documented with an analyst note.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of exposure findings and API for restricting resource access via security groups and policies

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create compliance incident tickets for publicly exposed resources

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify compliance and security teams of exposed resources and remediation actions

config.description: Triggers when a cloud resource is flagged as publicly exposed or improperly configured by AWS Security Hub

config.additional_instructions: Assess the risk of the exposed resource - evaluate data sensitivity, access patterns, and blast radius
config.description: AI-powered risk assessment evaluating the severity of the exposure, potential data sensitivity, and overall blast radius
Routes based on whether the AI assessment confirmed the resource is publicly accessible
Requires team lead approval before automatically restricting access to the publicly exposed resource

parameters.reason: Public exposure remediated — approved by team lead

config.description: Restrict access to the exposed resource via cloud security group or IAM policy changes
Scan the resource for indicators of data exposure such as access log anomalies and sensitive data classification hits
Create a compliance incident ticket documenting the exposure, risk assessment, and remediation actions
Notify both compliance and security teams with details of the exposure and remediation status

data.label: Add Note: Access Restricted to Authorized Networks

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (cloud_security template). Resource is not publicly exposed — access is restricted to authorized networks only. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that AI analysis confirmed the resource is not publicly exposed and access is properly restricted
